name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. MERGE step split into commit-always + push/PR-conditional (fixes uncommitted changes on release branch). CI discovery (runtime GitHub API or explicit required_checks). IDLE CI health agent (sonnet). Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. Simplify-worker agent for code review gate. Pluggable interview phase (native / grill-with-docs / grill-me). /setup-dev-loop scaffolds all 6 config sections including CI setup (Section F). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
